descriptions: Infobox lists BTW as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Power , Crips , BTW (Bad Troublesome Ward)

descriptions: The Batti clan is considered the 'long arm' of the Fabbrocino clan, acting on their behalf.
edges.evidence_quote: La famiglia Batti di San Giuseppe Vesuviano è considerata dagli inquirenti la "longa manus" del clan Fabbrocino.

descriptions: The Antonio Giugliano clan established relationships with the Batti clan for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: le due organizzazioni avevano instaurato rapporti con i clan Batti di San Giuseppe Vesuviano e Formicola di San Giovanni a Teduccio e con la 'ndrangheta

descriptions: The Rosario Giugliano clan also established relationships with the Batti clan for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: le due organizzazioni avevano instaurato rapporti con i clan Batti di San Giuseppe Vesuviano e Formicola di San Giovanni a Teduccio e con la 'ndrangheta

descriptions: Ajnad al-Sham Islamic Union is listed as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Ajnad al-Sham Islamic Union

descriptions: Ajnad al-Sham Islamic Union is an ally of Ahrar al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Ajnad al-Sham Islamic Union

descriptions: Ajnad al-Sham Islamic Union fought against the Islamic State.
edges.evidence_quote: Additional opponents: Ajnad al-Sham Islamic Union

descriptions: Ajnad al-Sham Islamic Union is listed as an additional opponent of Islamic State in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Additional opponents: Ajnad al-Sham Islamic Union

descriptions: Al-Shabaab competes with Islamic State in Somalia.
edges.evidence_quote: possibly motivated by competition with Islamic State in Somalia

descriptions: Islamic State in Somalia is a splinter group that broke away from Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2015, senior Al-Shabaab commander Abdul Qadir Mumin and approximately 20 of his followers in Puntland pledged allegiance to ISIL, establishing what became Islamic State in Somalia (ISIS).

Devil's Disciples Motorcycle Club (Canad.description: Canadian outlaw motorcycle club based in Greater Montreal, founded in late 1965. It was briefly the most powerful motorcycle gang in Montreal before disbanding in January 1976 after a biker war with the Popeyes. The club engaged in drug trafficking, intimidation, assault, and murder, and gained infamy for an assassination attempt on singer Johnny Hallyday.

descriptions: The Canadian and Boston Devil's Disciples clubs had a close friendship.
edges.evidence_quote: the Canadian and Boston groups maintained a close friendship with one another.

descriptions: Devil's Disciples had a longstanding feud with the Dubois Brothers.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang had a longstanding feud with the infamous Dubois Brothers

descriptions: Devil's Disciples fought a biker war with the Popeyes, which led to their disbandment.
edges.evidence_quote: the club achieved a short-lived prominence in Montreal and was, for a time, the most powerful motorcycle gang in the city before disbanding in January 1976 as a result of a biker war with the Popeyes

descriptions: The Dark Circle, founded by ex-Devil's Disciples, was Rock Machine's death squad.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dark Circle has often been described as Rock Machine 's death squad.

descriptions: Satan's Choice aligned with the Devil's Disciples against the Popeyes.
edges.evidence_quote: aligning themselves with the Devil's Disciples, as they were rivals to the Popeyes.

descriptions: Sundowners MC listed as an ally of Devil's Disciples in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Satan's Choice MC , Sundowners MC , Devil's Disciples MC (Boston, USA)

descriptions: The Dubois Brothers fought the Devil's Disciples for control of drug territory.
edges.evidence_quote: Claude Dubois considered this as a threat and intrusion into his and his Brothers territory and hired another muscle group of bikers called the Popeyes Motorcycle Club

descriptions: The Popeyes and Devil's Disciples fought a turf war from 1968 to 1970.
edges.evidence_quote: From 1968 up until 1970, a short but violent turf war for control of the drug trade went between the Popeyes and Devil's Disciples MC, another Canadian outlaw biker gang (unrelated to the similarly named U.S.-based club).

descriptions: Popeyes were in conflict with Devil's Disciples, killing 15 members.
edges.evidence_quote: The Popeyes had targeted the Devil's Disciples biker gang

descriptions: Devil's Disciples MC listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Outlaws MC (1974–1977), Hells Angels MC (1996–2000), Devil's Disciples MC

descriptions: Satan's Choice listed Devil's Disciples as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Devil's Disciples MC

descriptions: Satan's Choice and Devil's Disciples were allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Devil's Disciples MC

descriptions: Devil's Disciples are listed as allies of Satan's Choice in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Outlaws MC (1974–1977), Hells Angels MC (1996–2000), Devil's Disciples MC

descriptions: Infobox lists Devil's Disciples as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Outlaws MC (1974–1977), Hells Angels MC (1996–2000), Devil's Disciples MC

descriptions: Infobox lists Devil's Disciples as an ally of Satan's Choice.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Outlaws MC (1974–1977), Hells Angels MC (1996–2000), Devil's Disciples MC

descriptions: Puntland is an alleged ally of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Puntland (alleged)

'Ndrina Lanzino.description: The 'Ndrina Lanzino is a 'Ndrangheta crime family based in Cosenza, Calabria, Italy. They are allied with the Alvaro clan. The organization has been involved in extortion, drug trafficking, rigged slot machines, and public contract corruption. They have been targeted in multiple police operations, including 'Tela di ragno' and 'Acheruntia', and have infiltrated local politics.

descriptions: The Bruni and Lanzino-Patitucci groups are both mentioned in the same investigation about corrupt prison guards.
edges.evidence_quote: Grazie ai collaboratori Ernesto e Adolfo Foggetti e Mattia Pulicanò si è scoperto che due agenti corrotti avrebbero fornito ad esponenti degli zingari Rango e i Lanzino-Patitucci in carcere telefoni cellulari, droga e messaggi. I fatti sarebbero risalenti agli anni 2013 e 2014. Nell'inchiesta vengono citati anche i Bruni e i Perna.

descriptions: The Lanzino is a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Lanzino è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Cosenza .

descriptions: The Lanzino are allies of the Alvaro.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati degli Alvaro .

descriptions: Both Lanzino-Patitucci and Rango-Zingari received contraband from corrupt agents, but no direct relationship between the two orgs is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Grazie ai collaboratori Alfonso Foggetti e Mattia Pulicanò si è scoperto che due agenti corrotti avrebbero fornito ad esponenti dei Rango-Zingari e i Lanzino-Patitucci in carcere telefoni cellulari, droga e messaggi.

descriptions: Muto and Lanzino-Locicero are listed together in the 'tela di ragno' operation, but no specific relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Le 'ndrine in questione sono: Muto di Cetraro, Lanzino-Locicero di Cosenza, ...

descriptions: Muto and Lanzino-Ruà are both implicated in the 'Cumbertazione' operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 19 gennaio 2017 si conclude l'operazione "Cumbertazione" che porta al sequestro ... ai Muto ... e ai Lanzino-Ruà

descriptions: Piromalli and Lanzino-Ruà cooperated in rigging public tenders.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 19 gennaio 2017 si conclude l'operazione Cumbertazione che porta al sequestro di 54 imprese e 34 imprenditori riconducibili ai Piromalli, ai Muto ... e ai Lanzino-Ruà

descriptions: Both groups were involved in corruption with prison guards.
edges.evidence_quote: due agenti corrotti avrebbero fornito a esponenti degli zingari Rango e i Lanzino-Patitucci in carcere telefoni cellulari, droga e messaggi.

descriptions: Al Rashid Trust is listed as a non-state ally of Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Jaish-e-Mohammed , Pakistani Taliban , Hizbul Mujahideen , Harkat-ul-Jihad al-Islami , Harkat-ul-Mujahideen , Al-Badr , Al Rashid Trust , Indian Mujahideen , People’s Anti-Fascist Front , Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam , Al-Qaeda AQIS AGH

descriptions: LeT lists Al Rashid Trust as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... Al Rashid Trust

descriptions: Al Rashid Trust is listed as a non-state ally of LeT in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Jaish-e-Mohammed, Pakistani Taliban, Hizbul Mujahideen, Harkat-ul-Jihad al-Islami, Harkat-ul-Mujahideen, Al-Badr, Al Rashid Trust, Indian Mujahideen, People’s Anti-Fascist Front, Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam, Al-Qaeda AQIS AGH

descriptions: Al Rashid Trust is an ally of Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Jaish-e-Mohammed, Pakistani Taliban, Hizbul Mujahideen, Harkat-ul-Jihad al-Islami, Harkat-ul-Mujahideen, Al-Badr, Al Rashid Trust, Indian Mujahideen, People’s Anti-Fascist Front, Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam, Al-Qaeda AQIS AGH

De Stefano 'ndrina.description: The De Stefano 'ndrina is a powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta, a mafia-type organization based in Calabria, Italy. Originating from the Archi neighborhood of Reggio Calabria, it rose to prominence in the 1970s after the first 'Ndrangheta war. The clan has strong ramifications throughout Italy, particularly in Lombardy, Tuscany, Emilia-Romagna, and Liguria. Several of its members have been listed among Italy's most wanted fugitives.

descriptions: De Stefano 'ndrina is a constituent family of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: the De Stefano 'ndrina, from Reggio Calabria, named after De Stefano brothers

descriptions: Barreca allied with De Stefano-Tegano during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Second 'Ndrangheta war, the Barreca 'ndrina sided with the De Stefano-Tegano, Libri and Latella 'ndrine against Pasquale Condello, Diego Rosmini and Antonio Imerti.

descriptions: The Caligiuri collaborated with the De Stefano-Tegano in the murder of Giovanni Santoro.
edges.evidence_quote: cominciarono con l'assassinio del boss cirotano Giovanni Santoro detto " fortezza " ammazzato con 15 colpi di pistola a Cirò Marina il 30 agosto del 1977 con la collaborazione dei De Stefano-Tegano .

descriptions: Cataldo allied with De Stefano in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: the Cataldos allied themselves with the De Stefano 'ndrina

descriptions: Libri 'ndrina is historically allied to De Stefano 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: The Libri 'ndrina is historically allied to the De Stefano-Tegano 'ndrina

descriptions: Piromalli and De Stefano were in conflict during the First 'Ndrangheta War.
edges.evidence_quote: conflicts over business interests arose between Piromalli and the De Stefano clan, contributing to the First 'Ndrangheta War

descriptions: Infobox lists De Stefano as ally during First 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: First 'Ndrangheta war (1974-76): De Stefano 'ndrina

descriptions: Piromalli and De Stefano-Tegano affiliates were arrested together in operation Cupola.
edges.evidence_quote: 28 aprile 2009 nell'operazione Cupola vengono arrestate ... 4 per i De Stefano-Tegano di Reggio Calabria sorpresi in una riunione per discutere dei recenti fatti accaduti

descriptions: Coco-Trovato has a familial link with De Stefano-Tegano.
edges.evidence_quote: e hanno anche un legame parentale con i De Stefano-Tegano

descriptions: The De Stefano 'ndrina is listed as an ally of the Catania family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: , Pietraperzia Mafia family , Caltagirone Mafia family , Ramacca Mafia family , Riesi Mafia family , Santa Maria di Gesù Mafia family , Passo di Rigano Mafia family , Casalesi clan , Licciardi clan , Mallardo clan , De Stefano 'ndrina

descriptions: The De Stefano 'ndrina is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... De Stefano 'ndrina

descriptions: De Stefano is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta organization.
edges.evidence_quote: The De Stefano 'ndrina ... is one of the most powerful clans of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Cataldo and Mazzaferro were allied with De Stefano in the war.
edges.evidence_quote: In provincia ci fu la vittoria dei Piromalli e Mammoliti nella Piana di Gioia Tauro e dei Cataldo e Mazzaferro nella Locride tutte 'ndrine che avevano spinto per l'abbattimento della vecchia 'ndrangheta

descriptions: De Stefano fought a war against Condello-Imerti alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The bloody six-year war between the Condello-Imerti clan and De Stefano allied with the Tegano clan caused 621 deaths.

descriptions: Condello were underbosses of De Stefano, later became rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: A second 'Ndrangheta war was triggered by the marriage between Giuseppina Condello – the sister of the Condello brothers, underbosses of De Stefano – and Antonio Imerti

descriptions: De Stefano fought a war against Condello-Imerti alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The bloody six-year war between the Condello-Imerti clan and De Stefano allied with the Tegano clan caused 621 deaths.

descriptions: Libri 'ndrina was an ally of De Stefano during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991): Libri 'ndrina and Latella 'ndrina

descriptions: Mammoliti supported De Stefano against Tripodo.
edges.evidence_quote: the De Stefanos won a monopoly ... with the support of the Piromalli and Mammoliti 'ndrine

descriptions: The Mammoliti cosca supported the De Stefano clan after the war.
edges.evidence_quote: They won a monopoly of construction work in northern Reggio Calabria, moving the rival Tripodo group out of the market of public work contracts with the support of the Piromalli and Mammoliti cosche.

descriptions: Mammoliti supported the new faction alongside De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: la posizione di Piromalli venne appoggiata dalle nuove leve, come i De Stefano di Reggio Calabria , ma anche dai Mammoliti di Oppido Mamertina e Castellace

descriptions: Mazzaferro and Cataldo were allied with De Stefano in the war.
edges.evidence_quote: In provincia ci fu la vittoria dei Piromalli e Mammoliti nella Piana di Gioia Tauro e dei Cataldo e Mazzaferro nella Locride tutte 'ndrine che avevano spinto per l'abbattimento della vecchia 'ndrangheta

descriptions: Piromalli and De Stefano became rivals, leading to murder.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1977 disagreements about business interests emerged between Piromalli and the De Stefano clan. A hit squad headed by Giuseppe 'Peppe' Piromalli killed Giorgio De Stefano.

descriptions: Piromalli ordered the killing of Giorgio De Stefano, indicating conflict between the two groups.
edges.evidence_quote: He was killed by Giuseppe Suraci, apparently out of personal vengeance, but in reality on the orders of Piromalli, who feared the rise of the De Stefanos.

descriptions: Piromalli supported De Stefano against Tripodo.
edges.evidence_quote: the De Stefanos won a monopoly ... with the support of the Piromalli and Mammoliti 'ndrine

descriptions: De Stefano and Piromalli led the new faction against the old guard.
edges.evidence_quote: si ruppero quindi i vecchi equilibri all'interno dell'organizzazione criminale e presero forma due schieramenti tra loro contrapposti: da un lato la vecchia guardia con a capo Don Antonio Macrì e Don Mico Tripodo , dall'altra la nuova 'ndrangheta capeggiata da Don Mommo Piromalli e dai De Stefano .

descriptions: Rosmini 'ndrina was a rival of De Stefano during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991): Condello, Imerti, Serraino 'ndrina and Rosmini 'ndrina

descriptions: Serraino 'ndrina was a rival of De Stefano during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991): Condello, Imerti, Serraino 'ndrina and Rosmini 'ndrina

descriptions: De Stefano allied with Tegano through marriage during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: the wedding sealed the alliance between the De Stefanos and the powerful Tegano clan

descriptions: De Stefano became rivals with Tripodo and displaced them.
edges.evidence_quote: The De Stefanos ... won a monopoly of construction work in northern Reggio Calabria, moving the rival Tripodo group out of the market

descriptions: The De Stefano and Tripodo groups were in direct conflict, with Tripodo initiating violence against the De Stefanos.
edges.evidence_quote: Tripodo tried to strike first, killing Giovanni De Stefano and wounding his brother Giorgio De Stefano on 24 November 1974, in the Roof Garden bar, an infamous 'Ndrangheta haunt in Reggio Calabria.

descriptions: De Stefano saw Tripodo as an obstacle and later had him killed.
edges.evidence_quote: I De Stefano scalpitavano per emergere nel panorama 'ndranghetista e vedevano la presenza di don Mico Tripodo a Reggio Calabria come un freno alla loro crescita criminale.

descriptions: De Stefano brothers were originally members of Tripodo's clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The De Stefano brothers ... would come to prominence as members of the 'Ndrangheta clan of Domenico Tripodo

descriptions: De Stefano's leader Giorgio had contacts with Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: From his law office in Rome, he also had contacts with the Banda della Magliana.

descriptions: De Stefano had joint ventures with Camorra boss Cutolo.
edges.evidence_quote: the De Stefanos were the representation of the manager-criminal controlling a crime multinational with joint ventures with Raffaele Cutolo from the Camorra

descriptions: Macrì was a rival of De Stefano during the First 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: First 'Ndrangheta war (1974-76): Domenico Tripodo and Antonio Macrì

descriptions: Macrì's faction attacked De Stefano, killing Giovanni and wounding Giorgio.
edges.evidence_quote: Don Antonio Macrì si propose di fare da mediatore tra il Tripodo e i De Stefano ; questa, però, era solo una strategia del vecchio boss, e il 24 novembre del 1974 un commando fece irruzione nel bar Roof Garden sul lungomare di Reggio Calabria uccidendo Giovanni De Stefano e ferendo Giorgio De Stefano capo della 'ndrina

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina was an ally of De Stefano during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991): Libri 'ndrina and Latella 'ndrina

descriptions: De Stefano cooperated with NCO in drug trafficking and killing Tripodo.
edges.evidence_quote: Tripodo was killed with the help of Camorra boss Raffaele Cutolo, the boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) who worked with the De Stefano’s in drug trafficking.

descriptions: The De Stefanos cooperated with the NCO to kill Tripodo and in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: On 26 August 1976, he was stabbed to death in prison on the request of the De Stefanos with the help of Camorra boss Raffaele Cutolo, the boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) who worked with the De Stefanos in drug trafficking.

descriptions: De Stefano paid NCO to kill Tripodo.
edges.evidence_quote: Il capoclan Tripodo venne ucciso il 26 agosto 1976 dentro il carcere di Poggioreale in Campania da "soldati" della nuova camorra organizzata di Raffaele Cutolo ; quest'ultimo fu pagato 100 milioni di lire dai De Stefano per far assassinare il vecchio boss di Reggio Calabria .

descriptions: De Stefano had joint ventures with Cosa Nostra members.
edges.evidence_quote: the De Stefanos were the representation of the manager-criminal controlling a crime multinational with joint ventures with ... Nitto Santapaola and Francesco Ferrera from Cosa Nostra in Catania

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina collaborates with De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: in collaboration with the De Stefano and Pelle 'ndrina

descriptions: Latella allied with De Stefano-Tegano during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Second 'Ndrangheta war, the Latella 'ndrina joined the alliance with the De Stefano-Tegano

descriptions: NCO and De Stefano 'ndrina cooperated in drug trafficking and murder.
edges.evidence_quote: Domenico Tripodo, a powerful 'Ndrangheta boss of the time, was stabbed to death in prison on the request of the De Stefano 'ndrina, and with the help of Camorra boss Raffaele Cutolo, the boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) who worked with the De Stefano's in drug trafficking.

descriptions: Gambino boss Carlo Gambino formed an alliance with the Spatola clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Carlo Gambino created an alliance between the Gambino family and three Sicilian clans: the Inzerillos, the Spatolas and the Di Maggios.

Cártel de Tepalcatepec.description: Mexican drug trafficking organization based in Tepalcatepec, Michoacán, founded in 2018 by Juan José Farías Álvarez alias 'El Abuelo'. Originally a local self-defense group, it later turned to drug trafficking and joined Carteles Unidos to fight the Jalisco New Generation Cartel. Known for violent confrontations, use of explosive drones, and road blockades. Still active as of the article's writing.

descriptions: Cartel de Tepalcatepec joined Carteles Unidos to fight CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: El Cartel de Tepalcatepec antiguamente fue un grupo de autodefensas local, para luego pasar al narcotráfico , integrandosé a los Carteles Unidos para luchar contra el Cartel Jalisco Nueva Generación.

descriptions: Infobox lists Carteles Unidos as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cárteles Unidos

descriptions: The two cartels are in constant clashes and disputes.
edges.evidence_quote: El Cartel de Tepalcatepec , también conocido como el Cartel del Abuelo , es una organización criminal mexicana dedicada al tráfico de drogas, conocida por sus constantes enfrentamientos y disputas con el Cartel de Jalisco Nueva Generación en la frontera de Jalisco y Michoacán.

descriptions: Infobox lists CJNG as enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Gobierno de México , Cartel Jalisco Nueva Generación

descriptions: Cárteles Unidos includes the Cartel del Abuelo (Cártel de Tepalcatepec) as a component group.
edges.evidence_quote: Cárteles Unidos fueron conformándose por otros dos grupos delincuenciales locales, el Cartel del Abuelo, también conocidos como Cartel de Tepalcatepec

descriptions: CJNG attacked El Abuelo Cartel, declaring war and engaging in armed clashes.
edges.evidence_quote: The 2019 Western Michoacán clashes were a series of armed confrontations on 30 August 2019 between the Jalisco New Generation Cartel (CJNG) and the El Abuelo Cartel based in Tepalcatepec , Michoacán , Mexico .

descriptions: Infobox lists Cartel del Abuelo as a rival of CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel, Tijuana Cartel, Santa Rosa de Lima Cartel, Los Viagras, Cárteles Unidos, Autodefensas, Nueva Plaza Cartel, Knights Templar Cartel, La Familia Michoacana, Cártel del Noreste, La Unión Tepito, Los Zetas, Zetas Vieja Escuela, Barrio Azteca (current status unknown), Los Correa, Cartel del Abuelo, Grupo Sombra, Gente Nueva, La Nueva Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Infobox lists Cartel del Abuelo as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Cartel del Abuelo

descriptions: Cartel del Abuelo has advantage over CJNG in Tierra Caliente.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras and the Cartel del Abuelo were reported as having a 'profound advantage' over the CJNG in Tierra Caliente.

descriptions: Cartel del Abuelo is listed as a rival of CJNG in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel , Tijuana Cartel , Santa Rosa de Lima Cartel , Los Viagras , Cárteles Unidos , Autodefensas , Nueva Plaza Cartel , Knights Templar Cartel , La Familia Michoacana , Cártel del Noreste , La Unión Tepito , Los Zetas , Zetas Vieja Escuela , Barrio Azteca (current status unknown) , Los Correa , Cartel del Abuelo , Grupo Sombra , Gente Nueva , La Nueva Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Los Viagras and Cartel del Abuelo are allied against Jalisco New Generation Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras and the Cartel del Abuelo were reported as having a 'profound advantage' over New Generation in Tierra Caliente.

descriptions: Stoneydown is in alliance with or subsumed into Mali Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Many smaller local gangs are in alliance or have been subsumed into the Mali Boys, such as Drive & Marlowe (DM), Boundary, Coppermill, and Stoneydown.

descriptions: Members of Vrenna and Bonaventura moved closer to Megna and Russelli.
edges.evidence_quote: esponenti delle cosche Vrenna e Bonaventura , a causa di una divisione di queste si sono allontanati e avvicinati ai Megna e ai Russelli

descriptions: Hizbul Mujahideen is listed as a non-state ally of Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Jaish-e-Mohammed , Pakistani Taliban , Hizbul Mujahideen , Harkat-ul-Jihad al-Islami , Harkat-ul-Mujahideen , Al-Badr , Al Rashid Trust , Indian Mujahideen , People’s Anti-Fascist Front , Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam , Al-Qaeda AQIS AGH

descriptions: LeT lists Hizbul Mujahideen as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... Hizbul Mujahideen

descriptions: Hizbul Mujahideen is listed as a non-state ally of LeT in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Jaish-e-Mohammed, Pakistani Taliban, Hizbul Mujahideen, Harkat-ul-Jihad al-Islami, Harkat-ul-Mujahideen, Al-Badr, Al Rashid Trust, Indian Mujahideen, People’s Anti-Fascist Front, Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam, Al-Qaeda AQIS AGH

descriptions: LeT and Hizb-ul-Mujahideen conducted operations together.
edges.evidence_quote: The Lashkar is reported to have conducted several of its major operations in tandem with the Hizb-ul-Mujahideen.

descriptions: Lashkar-e-Jhangvi is a non-state ally of the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies Lashkar-e-Jhangvi

descriptions: Lashkar-e-Jhangvi is a non-state ally of Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies ... Lashkar-e-Jhangvi

descriptions: A faction of Lashkar-e-Jhangvi merged with TTP in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: the Amjad Farouqi group, one faction of the Lashkar-e-Jhangvi, ... merged with TTP.

descriptions: One faction of Lashkar-e-Jhangvi merged with TTP in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: the Amjad Farouqi group, one faction of the Lashkar-e-Jhangvi, the Musa Shaheed Karwan group, Mehsud factions of the TTP, Mohmand Taliban, Bajaur Taliban, Jamaat-ul-Ahrar, and Hizb-ul-Ahrar merged with TTP.

descriptions: A faction of Lashkar-e-Jhangvi merged with TTP.
edges.evidence_quote: the Amjad Farouqi group, one faction of the Lashkar-e-Jhangvi, the Musa Shaheed Karwan group, Mehsud factions of the TTP, Mohmand Taliban, Bajaur Taliban, Jamaat-ul-Ahrar, and Hizb-ul-Ahrar merged with TTP.

descriptions: The Farao 'ndrina is allied with the Marincola family.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Farao è una potentissima cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Cirò e Cirò Marina , alleata con i Marincola.

Boko Haram.description: Jihadist militant group based in northeastern Nigeria, founded in 2002 by Mohammed Yusuf. It seeks to establish an Islamic state and has been responsible for tens of thousands of deaths, mass abductions, and displacement of millions. The group split in 2016, with one faction becoming the Islamic State's West Africa Province. It remains active despite the death of long-time leader Abubakar Shekau in 2021.

descriptions: Boko Haram was an ally of al-Qaeda until 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies: ... Boko Haram (until 2015)

descriptions: Boko Haram is listed as a non-state ally of Al-Qaeda until 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies: ... Boko Haram (until 2015)

descriptions: AQIM, al-Shabaab, and Boko Haram attempted to coordinate activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb, the Somalia-based Al-Shabaab, and the Nigeria-based Boko Haram were as of June 2012 attempting to synchronize and coordinate their activities in terms of sharing funds, training and explosives.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab attempted to coordinate activities with Boko Haram.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 2012, General Carter Ham of the U.S. Army said that Al-Shabaab, al-Qaeda in Islamic Maghreb (AQIM), and the Nigeria-based Boko Haram were attempting to coordinate their activities, including in funding, training, and explosives.

descriptions: Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb is listed as a non-state ally of Boko Haram from 2007 to 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Taliban, al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb (2007–2015)

descriptions: Observers speculated Boko Haram was affiliated with AQIM.
edges.evidence_quote: The increased sophistication of the group led observers to speculate that Boko Haram was affiliated with Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb (AQIM), which was active in Niger.

descriptions: Boko Haram has maintained a relationship with AQIM for training and material support.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the UN Security Council listing of Boko Haram under the al-Qaeda sanctions regime in May 2014, the group 'has maintained a relationship with AQIM for training and material support purposes'.

descriptions: AQIM was an ally of Boko Haram from 2007 to 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb (2007–2015)

descriptions: Nigerian government claims Boko Haram has connections to al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: The Nigerian government claims that Boko Haram is 'the West Africa branch of the world-wide Al-Qaeda movement' with connections to al-Shabaab in Somalia and AQIM in Mali.

descriptions: Ansaru is a faction that split from Boko Haram and is loyal to al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: These were the "West African Province" which is part of ISIL; "Jamā'at Ahl as-Sunnah lid-Da'wah wa'l-Jihād" (Boko Haram), under Shekau's control; and "Ansaru" which is loyal to al-Qaeda and rejected the caliphate of al-Bagdadi.

descriptions: Boko Haram and ISIL became enemies due to territorial disputes.
edges.evidence_quote: Boko Haram and ISIL were initially allies. However, the two groups became enemies due to territorial disputes, because ISIL tried to conquer the zones which were under Boko Haram's control.

descriptions: Boko Haram was formerly aligned with ISIL.
edges.evidence_quote: The group formerly aligned itself with the Islamic State of Iraq and the Levant.

descriptions: Boko Haram pledged allegiance to ISIL and became its West African province.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2015, Shekau pledged allegiance to ISIS self-styled caliph Abu Bakr Al-Baghdadi and became "West African Province" (Wilayat Garb Ifriqiyah), i.e. the West African province of the Islamic State.

descriptions: Boko Haram pledged allegiance to ISIL, becoming part of it.
edges.evidence_quote: On 7 March, Boko Haram's leader Abubakar Shekau pledged allegiance to ISIL via an audio message posted on the organisation's Twitter account.

descriptions: Boko Haram split in 2016, creating the hostile faction ISWAP.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, the group split, resulting in the emergence of a hostile faction known as the Islamic State's West Africa Province.

descriptions: ISWAP emerged as a hostile faction after a split from Boko Haram.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, the group split, resulting in the emergence of a hostile faction known as the Islamic State's West Africa Province.

edges.evidence_quote: Many designated terror groups have pledged their allegiance to the new Taliban government, these groups include: Al-Qaeda, al Shabaab, Boko Haram, Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal-Muslimin and Turkistan Islamic Party, Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan, Harkat-ul-Mujahideen.

descriptions: ISKP allied with ETIP.
edges.evidence_quote: the newly ordained ISIS–K forged significant alliances with other Sunni jihadist movements in the region to include the Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan (IMU), Islamic Movement of Turkmenistan (IMT), Uyghur East Turkestan Islamic Party (ETIP)

descriptions: Many early Al-Shabaab leaders previously belonged to al-Ittihad al-Islamiya.

Al-Zein crime family.description: The Al-Zein crime family is a Mhallami mafia organization primarily based in Germany, with an estimated 15,000 members. It is involved in drug trafficking, armed robbery, arms trafficking, assault, extortion, fraud, money laundering, kidnapping, and murder. The clan originated from the Syrian-Turkish border region and migrated to Lebanon and later Germany. It is considered the second-largest criminal clan in North Rhine-Westphalia.

descriptions: Al-Zein has family ties to Fakhro clan in Malmö.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the police clan report, the family-based criminal network El-Zein has family ties to the Fakhro clan in Malmö.

descriptions: Some Al-Zein family members are involved with La Familia.
edges.evidence_quote: Some families are or were involved in various motorcycle gangs: Outlaws, La Familia, and more recently Satudarah.

descriptions: Infobox lists Miri-Clan as an ally of Al-Zein.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Miri-Clan

descriptions: Infobox lists Mocro Maffia as a rival of Al-Zein.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mocro Maffia

descriptions: Some Al-Zein family members are involved with Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: Some families are or were involved in various motorcycle gangs: Outlaws, La Familia, and more recently Satudarah.

descriptions: Family Union includes members of Remmo clan, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Its members also include relatives of other large Arab families, including the Remmo clan.

descriptions: Some Al-Zein family members are involved with Satudarah.
edges.evidence_quote: Some families are or were involved in various motorcycle gangs: Outlaws, La Familia, and more recently Satudarah.

descriptions: Miri clan member killed a member of the Al-Zein crime family, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2024 a 34-year old Miri clan member murdered a men of the rival Al-Zein crime family on a public street in Stade, close to Hamburg.

descriptions: 6bop gang is a rival of The Americans as it is affiliated with The British.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rivals of the Americans gang include all gangs affiliated to the British gang corporate body. These include the Hard Livings , 28s street gang, Junky Funky Kids, Ghetto Kids, Nice Time Kids, The Terrible West Siders, The Fancy Boys, 6bop gang

descriptions: The Noe-Schultz Gang was aligned with the Five Families.
edges.evidence_quote: Allegiance: New York City's Five Families

descriptions: Islamic State originated from Jaish al-Ta'ifa al-Mansurah.
edges.evidence_quote: Originating in the Jaish al-Ta'ifa al-Mansurah founded by Abu Omar al-Baghdadi in 2004

descriptions: The Islamic State originated from Jaish al-Ta'ifa al-Mansurah.
edges.evidence_quote: Originating in the Jaish al-Ta'ifa al-Mansurah founded by Abu Omar al-Baghdadi in 2004

14K.description: The 14K is a triad group based in Hong Kong but active internationally, founded in 1945 by Kuomintang Lieutenant-General Kot Siu-wong in Guangzhou, China. It is the second largest triad in the world with around 20,000 members, primarily involved in drug trafficking, illegal gambling, and other criminal activities. The group relocated to Hong Kong in 1949 and remains active, with a loose structure and factional violence.

descriptions: 14K-Hau is a sub-group of 14K.
edges.evidence_quote: 14K : 14K Yee 14K Hau 14K Yan 14K Yung 14K Ngai 14K Chung 14K Mui 14K Tak

descriptions: 14K-Ngai is a sub-group of 14K.
edges.evidence_quote: 14K : 14K Yee 14K Hau 14K Yan 14K Yung 14K Ngai 14K Chung 14K Mui 14K Tak

descriptions: 14K cooperates with Abu Sayyaf in arms smuggling and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: The 14K triad has been involved in smuggling arms to Abu Sayyaf and has reportedly cooperated with the Islamic group in laundering and transmitting ransom money

descriptions: Ah Kong is a rival of 14K per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ah Kong , Big Circle Gang , Sun Yee On , Wo On Lok , Wo Shing Wo

descriptions: Big Circle Gang is a rival of 14K in Australia.
edges.evidence_quote: Their rivals were Wo Shing Wo, Lo San, Big Circle and Sun Yee On.

descriptions: 14K absorbed remnants of Ghost Shadows in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: absorbed the remnants of the defunct Ghost Shadows

descriptions: 14K sells pseudoephedrine to Head Hunters.
edges.evidence_quote: They are involved in the importation of pseudoephedrine ... which they sell to local drug trafficking gangs, the Head Hunters and the Hells Angels.

descriptions: 14K sells pseudoephedrine to Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: They are involved in the importation of pseudoephedrine ... which they sell to local drug trafficking gangs, the Head Hunters and the Hells Angels.

descriptions: Lo San is a rival of 14K in Australia.
edges.evidence_quote: Their rivals were Wo Shing Wo, Lo San, Big Circle and Sun Yee On.

descriptions: 14K has connections to Ping On leadership.
edges.evidence_quote: The 14K has had connections to the leadership of the Ping On triad in Boston

descriptions: 14K is a component of Sam Gor syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sam Gor syndicate is composed of 14K and other Triads and has Canadian roots in and leadership from the Big Circle Boys.

descriptions: Wo On Lok is a rival of 14K per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ah Kong , Big Circle Gang , Sun Yee On , Wo On Lok , Wo Shing Wo

descriptions: Shui Fong Triad challenged 14K in 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: Under Wan Kuok-koi (nicknamed "Broken Tooth Koi", 崩牙駒 ), the 14K was being challenged by the smaller Shui Fong Triad.

descriptions: 14K supplies raw materials to Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Intelligence reports from the Attorney General of Mexico and the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency have indicated that the 14K triad is among the suppliers of raw materials used in the manufacturing of methamphetamine to the Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: Snakeheads are allies of 14K per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Ping On , Snakeheads , Wah Ching , Tiny Rascal Gang

descriptions: 14K and Sun Yee On are main rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: They are the main rival of the Sun Yee On

descriptions: Tiny Rascal Gang is an ally of 14K per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Ping On , Snakeheads , Wah Ching , Tiny Rascal Gang

descriptions: 14K has connections to Wah Ching leadership.
edges.evidence_quote: The 14K has had connections to the leadership of the Ping On triad in Boston and Wah Ching in San Francisco.

descriptions: 14K and Wo Shing Wo are rivals in Ireland and UK, with turf wars and cooperation in cigarette smuggling.
edges.evidence_quote: The reported criminal activities of the triads included the trafficking of women and children from China into Ireland, involvement in casinos, and money laundering. Gardaí also reported a great deal of interaction between the Chinese gangs operating in Ireland and Scotland.

descriptions: Both 14K and Wo Shing Wo are mentioned as possible recipients of heroin shipments, indicating a potential cooperative or competitive relationship in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: It is unclear which Triad was responsible for first importing heroin into the UK; however, authorities believe it was originally transported from Hong Kong via Amsterdam by the Ng Sik-ho , and received by either the 14k or the recently arrived Wo Shing Wo .

descriptions: 14K is listed as an ally of Abu Sayyaf in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K, Maute Group, Al-Qaeda (formerly)

descriptions: Abu Sayyaf is allied with 14K.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K , Maute Group , Al-Qaeda (formerly)

descriptions: Abu Sayyaf coordinated with 14K Triad for kidnappings and received military support.
edges.evidence_quote: Abu Sayyaf coordinated with the Chinese 14K Triad gang in carrying out the kidnappings. The 14K Triad has militarily supported Abu Sayyaf.

descriptions: 14K is listed as an ally of Abu Sayyaf.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K

descriptions: Infobox lists 14K as rival of Ah Kong.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K

descriptions: Ah Kong clashed with and defeated 14K after a disrespect incident.
edges.evidence_quote: There was an occasion when Siam-kia was disrespected by the 14K boss known as Ngau Si. A clash between the two gangs erupted. Ah Kong defeated 14K

descriptions: 14K is listed as a rival of Ah Kong in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K

descriptions: Australian-Albanian organized crime has links to 14K triad.
edges.evidence_quote: An internal police assessment ... claims their criminality now extends worldwide with direct Australian-Albanian Organised Crime links to notorious Mexican and Colombian clans and cartels and Asian triads including the 14K group

descriptions: Big Circle Gang has a rivalry with 14K Triad.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K Triad

descriptions: 14k Triad is listed as an ally of Black Dragons in the infobox.

descriptions: The Luppino family has a rivalry with the 14K triad.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Independent Soldiers, Musitano crime family, Rizzuto crime family, 14K (triad), Hells Angels

descriptions: Ping On served as a recruitment and training ground for 14K Triad.
edges.evidence_quote: The Ping On was regarded as a 'farm team' for the 14K triad in Hong Kong.

descriptions: 14K is a constituent triad of Sam Gor.
edges.evidence_quote: Sam Gor is made up of 14K, Wo Shing Wo, Sun Yee On, Big Circle Gang and Bamboo Union.

descriptions: Shui Fong and 14K were engaged in a gang war in Macau during the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: They were involved in a high-profile gang war with perennial rivals the 14K, led in Macau by 'Broken Tooth Koi' during this period.

descriptions: The infobox lists 14K as a rival of Shui Fong.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K, Wo Shing Wo

descriptions: 14K Triad is allied with Sinaloa Cartel for precursor chemicals.
edges.evidence_quote: 14K Triad

descriptions: Snakeheads are allied with 14K.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K , Cosa Nostra ( Italy ) , Inagawa-kai ( Japan )

descriptions: Sun Yee On competes with 14K in the fictional setting of Black Lagoon.
edges.evidence_quote: In the anime adaptation of Black Lagoon, the Thai branch of Sun Yee On... competes with the other organised crime syndicates in the city like the 14K.

descriptions: TRG formed alliances with 14K.
edges.evidence_quote: They have formed alliances with Chinese organizations such as the 14K, Wah Ching and Wo Hop To in California and the New York City-based Ghost Shadows.

descriptions: 14K is a triad group active in heroin trade.
edges.evidence_quote: The most important triads active in the international heroin trade are the 14K and the Big Circle Gang.

descriptions: 14K is a triad based in Hong Kong, listed as a powerful triad.
edges.evidence_quote: The most powerful triads based in Hong Kong are: - 14K : 14K Yee 14K Hau 14K Yan 14K Yung 14K Ngai 14K Chung 14K Mui 14K Tak

descriptions: 14K is a triad group; Wan Kuok-koi is a former leader of its Macau branch.
edges.evidence_quote: Wan Kuok-koi , former leader of the Macau branch of 14K

descriptions: 14K is listed as an ally of Wah Ching in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 14K

descriptions: Wo Shing Wo and 14K are rivals in Ireland.
edges.evidence_quote: the activities of the Wo Shing Wo and their rival 14K

descriptions: Wo Shing Wo battled 14K in Amsterdam in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: the group battled the 14K and Ah Kong for control of the heroin trade in Amsterdam

descriptions: Wo Shing Wo attacked 14K members in Glasgow in 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: Wo Shing Wo footsoldiers ambushed 14K members in a machete attack on Glasgow's Sauchiehall Street in July 2003

descriptions: Wo Shing Wo cooperated with 14K in the Netherlands recently.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wo Shing Wo has more recently also closely cooperated with the 14K.

descriptions: Wo Shing Wo cooperated with 14K in cigarette smuggling in Scotland.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wo Shing Wo in Scotland has cooperated with the 14K in cigarette smuggling.

descriptions: Ghetto Brothers called a peace meeting attended by Latin Spades.
edges.evidence_quote: It took place on December 8, 1971, and was attended by two hundred representatives from dozens of Bronx gangs, including the Black Pearls, Black Spades, Dirty Dozens, Dutchmen, Latin Spades, Liberated Panthers, Magnificent Seven, Peacemakers, Royal Javelins, Savage Skulls, Seven Immortals, Turbans, and Young Sinners, together with police and city officials.

descriptions: Ait Soussan organisation was allied with Bouyakhrichan organisation.
edges.evidence_quote: Houssine Ait Soussan is notably a prominent figure within the Moroccan mafia in the Netherlands and Belgium, and he was also allied with the Bouyakhrichan organisation.

descriptions: Bouyakhrichan organisation suspected of assassinating Abdelhadi Yaqout, cousin of Noffel clan leader.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bouyakhrichan organisation are the main suspects of this assassination.

descriptions: Samir Bouyakhrichan was a rival of the Taghi organisation.
edges.evidence_quote: Samir Bouyakhrichan was a known rival of the Taghi organisation

descriptions: Infobox lists CNG as a rival of Os Manos.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , V7 , Os Tauras , BNC , Os Aberto , Cebolas , CNG

descriptions: A member switched affiliation from VIS to SIC, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Pantyu Pantev, a.k.a. "Polly" - Drug smuggler, initially affiliated with VIS, later with SIC.

'Ndrina Acri.description: The 'Ndrina Acri is a 'ndrina (criminal family) of the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria, based in Rossano, Province of Cosenza, with branches in Germany. It is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, receiving stolen goods, and attempted murder. The organization was hit by a major police operation in June 2013, resulting in 28 arrests and seizure of assets worth €40 million.

descriptions: 'Ndrina Acri is a subunit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Acri è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: Nicola Acri, boss of 'Ndrina Acri, is linked to the Abbruzzese clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Nicola Acri ... legato agli Abbruzzese di Cassano allo Ionio

descriptions: 'Ndrina Acri was in conflict with the Giglio clan over the Strongoli massacre.
edges.evidence_quote: strage di Strongoli ... in contrasto con i Giglio di Strongoli
